message:
feat(cli): Add premium commands to help output and improve auth error handling

Help Command Enhancement:
- Add new "Premium" section to both JSON and formatted help output
- Document all premium commands: login, logout, whoami, save, sync, notes, collections
- Include relevant options for each command (--json, --add, --export, etc.)
- Maintain consistent formatting with existing command categories

Login Command Improvements:
- Add try/catch around device code JSON parsing with proper error messages
- Validate device_code, user_code, and verification_url fields before proceeding
- Remove mandatory rawTier check from callback validation (tier may be undefined
  for new accounts or during certain auth flows)
- Provide clear error messages for both JSON and human-readable output modes

Notes Command Fix:
- Remove local prompt registry validation before API calls
- This allows users to add notes to premium-only prompts that don't exist
  in the free tier registry
- The API will validate prompt existence server-side

These changes improve the CLI user experience by making premium features
more discoverable and providing better error feedback during authentication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
